mnemonics.title: A* Components
mnemonics.content: A* = Actual (g(n)) + Assumed (h(n)) - Remember that A* combines the Actual cost so far with the Assumed cost to goal

mnemonics.title: Admissible Heuristic
mnemonics.content: Always Accurate, Never Exaggerates - Admissible heuristics are Always Accurate (never overestimate) and Never Exaggerate the cost to goal
